name: Autodesk, Inc.
description: Autodesk, Inc. is a global leader in software design and services, providing 3D design, engineering, and entertainment software. The company serves customers across the architecture, engineering, construction, product design, manufacturing, media, and entertainment industries. Autodesk's popular software solutions, including AutoCAD, Revit, Inventor, and Maya, enable users to design, visualize, simulate, and analyze real-world performance of their ideas before they are built or created.
